story.iWant: to download my converted preset file
story.soThat: I can use it in my photography software

tasks.task: Create downloader.js module for download handling
Implement enableDownload() function with Blob creation
Add MIME type mapping for all formats (NP3, XMP, lrtemplate)
Implement download button UI updates and event handling
Add object URL management (create and revoke)
Add filename generation from original name + target extension
Add download state management (downloading, success, error)
Add CSS styling for download button states
Add HTML elements for download button and status messages

criterion.title: Display Download Button After Conversion
criterion.requirement: Download button appears after conversion succeeds (Story 2-6)
Button initially disabled (no converted data yet)
Button enabled after conversionComplete event
Button text: "Download [FileName].[ext]" (e.g., "Download Classic Chrome.xmp")
Button style: Primary action (blue background, prominent)
criterion.test: Upload file → convert to XMP → verify download button appears with correct filename, enabled state

criterion.title: Generate Download Link from Converted Data
criterion.requirement: Create Blob from converted Uint8Array
Set correct MIME type: NP3 (application/octet-stream), XMP (application/xml), lrtemplate (text/plain)
Generate object URL using URL.createObjectURL()
Store URL for download trigger
criterion.test: Convert file to XMP, verify Blob created, size matches, object URL generated (starts with "blob:http://...")

criterion.title: Trigger Browser Download on Button Click
criterion.requirement: Create temporary <a> element with download attribute
Set href to object URL
Set download attribute to correct filename
Programmatically click <a> to trigger download
Browser saves file to default downloads folder
criterion.test: Convert file to XMP, click Download button, verify browser downloads "Classic Chrome.xmp" to default folder

criterion.title: Correct Filename and Extension
criterion.requirement: Output filename = input filename with new extension
Extension matches target format: .np3, .xmp, .lrtemplate
Preserve original filename (don't add timestamps or random IDs)
Handle special characters in filename (sanitize if needed)
criterion.test: Upload "Classic Chrome.np3" → convert to XMP → download "Classic Chrome.xmp". Upload "My Preset (v2).xmp" → convert to lrtemplate → download "My Preset (v2).lrtemplate"

criterion.title: Clean Up Object URLs (Memory Management)
criterion.requirement: Revoke object URL after download completes
Use URL.revokeObjectURL() to free memory
Revoke previous URLs when new conversion starts
No memory leak from accumulated object URLs
criterion.test: Convert and download 10 files, verify memory usage stable (DevTools profiler), only one object URL active

criterion.title: Handle Download Errors
criterion.requirement: If download fails (browser blocks, no disk space): show user-friendly error
Log technical error to console
Keep download button enabled (allow retry)
Handle browser popup blockers if applicable
criterion.test: Block downloads in browser settings, click Download, verify error message displayed, console shows technical details, retry works after unblocking

criterion.title: Visual Feedback During Download
criterion.requirement: Button text changes to "Downloading..." (briefly)
Button disabled during download (prevent double-click)
Button returns to "Download [FileName]" after download completes
Success message: "✓ Download complete!"
criterion.test: Click Download button, verify shows "Downloading..." briefly, returns to normal, success message displayed

criterion.title: Reset UI After Download (Optional)
criterion.requirement: Optionally show "Convert Another File" button after download
Allow user to upload new file without refreshing page
Clear previous conversion data when new file uploaded
criterion.test: Complete full flow → download → upload new file → verify download button cleared, new conversion works

artifact.title: Technical Specification: Epic 2 - Web Interface
artifact.snippet: Simple story (0.5-1 day). Deliverables: Blob creation from Uint8Array, download trigger via <a download>, filename generation. Works across Chrome, Firefox, Safari. User can cancel/retry.

artifact.title: Technical Specification: Epic 2 - Web Interface
artifact.snippet: Step 7: Convert Uint8Array → Blob. Step 8: Create download URL: URL.createObjectURL(blob). Step 9: Trigger download via <a download="...">. Step 10: User's filesystem has converted file. All data stays in browser memory (no persistence).

artifact.title: Product Requirements Document
artifact.snippet: Instant download of converted file. Success criteria: Download works reliably (100% success rate), Correct filename and extension, File opens in target software (Nikon ViewNX, Lightroom). Final step in conversion flow.

artifact.title: Architecture
artifact.snippet: Converts Go []byte → Uint8Array → Blob → Download. Uses File API (FileReader, Blob, URL.createObjectURL). Browser compatibility: 90%+ (2017+). All processing client-side.

artifact.title: Story 2-6: WASM Conversion Execution
artifact.snippet: Dispatches CustomEvent('conversionComplete', {detail: {convertedData: Uint8Array, format: string}}) after successful conversion. Story 2-7 will listen for this event to enable download.

artifact.title: Story 2-6: WASM Conversion Execution
artifact.snippet: getConvertedFileData(): Returns Uint8Array of converted file. getConvertedFileName(): Returns filename with correct extension. getConvertedFileFormat(): Returns target format string.

artifact.reason: Story 2-6 provides converted file data as Uint8Array. Required to create Blob for download.
Story 2-6 provides output filename with correct extension. Used for download attribute and button text.
Story 2-6 provides target format. Used to determine MIME type for Blob creation.
Central event handler. Will integrate downloader.js enableDownload() function. Receives converted data and format from Story 2-6.
File upload event from Story 2-2. Triggers clearDownloadState() to reset UI when new file uploaded.
Story 2-2 dispatches fileLoaded event when new file uploaded. Used to clear download state and reset UI.
Download button element (to be added). Needs event handler, dynamic text updates, enable/disable states.
Button styling. Needs primary action styling (blue), hover states, disabled state (gray).

javascript.package: Create Blob from Uint8Array with MIME type
createElement('a'), appendChild(), click() for programmatic download
conversionComplete event listener, fileLoaded event listener

browser.requirement: Required for creating downloadable files from Uint8Array
Required for forcing download instead of navigation (Chrome 14+, Firefox 20+, Safari 10.1+)

story-dependencies.story: Provides converted file data, filename, format via conversionComplete event and getter functions
Provides fileLoaded event for UI reset when new file uploaded

constraints.constraint: All download processing client-side - no server upload/download
Event-driven integration - listen for conversionComplete from Story 2-6
Use browser default download location (no custom folder picker)
Object URLs must be revoked after download to prevent memory leaks
Only one download URL active at a time (revoke previous on new conversion)
Download should be instant for typical files (<500KB)
Preserve original filename, only change extension to match target format
Trust browser filename sanitization (no custom security logic needed)
Use correct MIME types: NP3 (application/octet-stream), XMP (application/xml), lrtemplate (text/plain)
Download button only visible after successful conversion
Download button disabled during download to prevent double-clicks
User-friendly error messages for download failures (browser blocks, disk space, etc.)
Must work in Chrome, Firefox, Safari (latest 2 versions each)
Download attribute supported in all target browsers (2014+)

interface.name: conversionComplete event
interface.description: Dispatched by Story 2-6 after successful conversion. Provides converted file data and format. This story listens for this event to enable download.

interface.name: getConvertedFileData()
interface.description: Returns converted file data. Used to create Blob for download.

interface.name: getConvertedFileName()
interface.description: Returns output filename with correct extension. Used for download attribute and button text.

interface.name: getConvertedFileFormat()
interface.description: Returns target format ("np3" | "xmp" | "lrtemplate"). Used to determine MIME type.

interface.name: fileLoaded event
interface.description: Dispatched when new file uploaded. Used to clear download state and reset UI.

interface.name: enableDownload()
interface.signature: enableDownload(fileData: Uint8Array, fileName: string, format: string): void
interface.description: Creates Blob, generates object URL, updates download button. Called when conversionComplete event received.

interface.name: clearDownloadState()
interface.description: Revokes object URL, hides download button, clears messages. Called when new file uploaded.

interface.name: Blob API
interface.signature: new Blob(array: Uint8Array[], options: {type: string}): Blob
interface.description: Creates Blob from Uint8Array with MIME type. Used to prepare file for download.

interface.name: URL.createObjectURL()
interface.description: Generates blob: URL for download. Returns URL like "blob:http://localhost:8080/uuid".

interface.name: URL.revokeObjectURL()
interface.description: Frees memory associated with object URL. Must be called after download completes.

standards.standard: Manual testing in browser DevTools (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
Console logging for download events (URL creation, revocation)
Visual verification of download button states (hidden, enabled, disabled)
File validation - downloaded files must open in target software (Lightroom, Nikon ViewNX)
Memory profiling with DevTools (verify object URLs properly revoked, no leaks)
Error simulation (browser download blocks, disk space issues)
Filename testing with special characters and various formats

locations.location: web/static/downloader.js (unit tests can be added inline or separate test file)
Browser console (manual testing, download event logs)
DevTools Memory profiler (verify no object URL leaks)
Browser Downloads folder (verify files downloaded with correct names)
Target software (Lightroom, Nikon ViewNX) for file validation

ideas.idea: Test download button visibility: Convert file, verify button appears with correct filename text
Test Blob creation: Verify Blob created from Uint8Array, correct MIME type, size matches
Test download trigger: Click button, verify browser downloads file to default folder
Test filename generation: Upload "Classic Chrome.np3" → convert to XMP → verify downloads as "Classic Chrome.xmp"
Test memory management: Download 10 files, take heap snapshots, verify only one object URL active
Test error handling: Block downloads in browser, verify error message, console log, retry works
Test visual feedback: Verify button shows "Downloading...", then normal state, success message appears
Test UI reset: Complete full flow → upload new file → verify download button cleared
Test all format combinations: Download NP3, XMP, lrtemplate files, verify correct extensions and MIME types
Test special characters: Upload "My Preset (v2) [Final].xmp" → verify downloads with same filename plus new extension
Test multiple downloads: Click download button 5 times without re-converting, verify each download succeeds
Test file validation: Download NP3 file, copy to Nikon camera, verify loads in Picture Control menu
Test file validation: Download XMP file, import to Lightroom, verify preset appears and applies correctly
Test browser compatibility: Run same tests in Chrome, Firefox, Safari, verify identical behavior
Test object URL lifecycle: Log createObjectURL and revokeObjectURL calls, verify proper cleanup
